mapper.sql: pe . work_card ,c.date, pe.name, pe.gender, fdev.ext_dept_name,fdev.ext_department_name, fdev.ext_team_name, d.clockDiff, d.overTime, ( SELECT CONCAT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), c2.clock_time), ' ', '' ) AS "data()" FROM ac_clock_record c2 WHERE c2.employee_id = c.employee_id AND c2.date = c.date ORDER BY clock_time FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)') AS clock_times

select DISTINCT
FROM ( SELECT c.id, c.employee_id,c.date,c.create_time,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY date DESC, employee_id DESC) AS RowNum FROM ac_clock_record c ) AS c JOIN pm_employee as pe ON pe.id = c.employee_id JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id=fdev.id CROSS APPLY (SELECT * FROM dbo.get_pre_next_date2(c.date, c.employee_id)) AS d
mapper.insert: insert into ac_leave_application (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, user_department, user_section, groups, position, reason, total_number, hr_total, modify_reason, version, to_be_uploaded_flag, approval_node, approval_employee, approval_result, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time) values (#{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalNumber,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{hrTotal,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{modify_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{to_be_uploaded_flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO ac_leave_application (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, user_department, user_section, groups, position, reason, total_number, version, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{oa_order}, #{nick_name}, #{user_name}, #{user_department}, #{user_section}, #{groups}, #{position}, #{reason}, #{total_number}, 0, #{create_by}, GETDATE())

INSERT INTO ac_leave_application_line (oa_order, leave_type, start_time, end_time, number, version, work_number, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.oa_order}, #{item.leave_type}, CONVERT(datetime, #{item.start_time}), CONVERT(datetime, #{item.end_time}), CONVERT(float, #{item.total_number}), 0, CONVERT(float, #{item.work_number}), #{item.create_by}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT pe.work_card, c.date, pe.name, pe.gender, fdev.ext_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name, fdev.ext_team_name, d.clockDiff, d.overTime, ( SELECT CONCAT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), c2.clock_time), ' ', '' ) AS "data()" FROM ac_clock_record c2 WHERE c2.employee_id = c.employee_id AND c2.date = c.date ORDER BY clock_time FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)') AS clock_times FROM ( SELECT c.id, c.employee_id,c.date,c.create_time,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY date DESC, employee_id DESC) AS RowNum FROM ac_clock_record c ) AS c JOIN pm_employee as pe ON pe.id = c.employee_id JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id=fdev.id CROSS APPLY (SELECT * FROM dbo.get_pre_next_date2(c.date, c.employee_id)) AS d WHERE c.RowNum BETWEEN 0 AND 100 ORDER BY c.date desc

SELECT count(1) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT pe.work_card, c.date FROM ac_clock_record c JOIN pm_employee as pe ON pe.id = c.employee_id JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id) as c

SELECT pe.work_card, c.date, pe.name, pe.gender, fdev.ext_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name, fdev.ext_team_name, d.clockDiff, d.overTime, (SELECT CONCAT(CONVERT(VARCHAR (5), c2.clock_time), '') AS "data()" FROM ac_clock_record c2 WHERE c2.employee_id = c.employee_id AND c2.date = c.date ORDER BY clock_time FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)') AS clock_times FROM ac_clock_record c JOIN pm_employee as pe ON pe.id = c.employee_id JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id=fdev.id CROSS APPLY (SELECT * FROM dbo.get_pre_next_date(c.date, c.employee_id)) AS d WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY c.date desc OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY;
